landing.trialBadge: 7-day free trial · No credit card required
landing.heroDesc: Daily News Brewer curates the most relevant news for you every morning — summarized by Claude AI, delivered to your inbox.
landing.feature1Desc: Select from 20 preset topics or add your own. AI, Startups, Markets, Geopolitics — you decide.
landing.feature2Desc: Every morning, Claude AI reads hundreds of articles and picks the top stories that matter to you.
landing.feature3Desc: A clean, readable email lands at 7 AM every day. No noise, no clickbait — just signal.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

login.subtitle: Sign in to access your daily briefing
login.errorInvalid: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
login.errorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Get your personalized news briefing every morning
signup.errorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

onboarding.title: What topics interest you?
onboarding.subtitle: Select up to {max} topics to personalize your morning briefing.
onboarding.errorSelectOne: Please select at least one topic to continue.
onboarding.errorSaving: Failed to save topics. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's your Daily News Brewer dashboard
dashboard.daysLeft: {count} day left in your free trial.
dashboard.daysLeftPlural: {count} days left in your free trial.
dashboard.nextBriefing: Your next briefing arrives tomorrow at {time}.
dashboard.noTopicsYet: No topics yet. Add some to start receiving briefings.

topics.title: Manage Topics
topics.subtitle: Select up to {max} topics for your daily briefing.
topics.atMax: Maximum {max} topics reached. Remove one to add another.
topics.errorMinLength: Topic name must be at least 2 characters.
topics.errorMaxLength: Topic name must be 60 characters or fewer.
topics.errorAtMax: You can have at most {max} topics.
topics.errorMinOne: You must have at least one topic active.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Live news feed from your active topics.
timeline.noArticles: No articles in this time range
timeline.noArticlesHint: Try widening the time filter or refreshing.
timeline.noTopicsHint: Go to Topics to add some.

blogs.title: Blogs
blogs.subtitle: Articles from your favourite blogs and publications.
blogs.noPostsInRange: No posts in this time range
blogs.noPostsHint: Try widening the time filter or refreshing.

sourcesPage.title: Blog Sources
sourcesPage.subtitle: Manage the RSS feeds shown in your Blogs feed.
sourcesPage.noSourcesYet: No sources yet. Add some from the presets above or enter a custom RSS URL.

search.title: Search News
search.subtitle: Search across all news sources worldwide.
search.placeholder: Search for any topic, company, event…
search.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or check your spelling.

archive.title: Archive
archive.subtitle: Your previous briefing emails.
archive.noBriefingsHint: Your briefings will appear here once they've been delivered.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account settings
profile.pwdTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
